elasticache.subnetgroup.CacheSubnetGroup.Description: The name for the cache subnet group. This value is stored as a lowercase string.  Constraints: Must contain no more than 255 alphanumeric characters or hyphens.  Example: `mysubnetgroup`

elasticache.subnetgroup.Description.Description: The description for the cache subnet group.

elasticache.subnetgroup.SubnetIds.Description: The EC2 subnet IDs for the cache subnet group.

elasticache.subnetgroup.Tags.Description: A tag that can be added to an ElastiCache subnet group. Tags are composed of a Key/Value pair. You can use tags to categorize and track all your subnet groups. A tag with a null Value is permitted.
